name: IRS — Form 2553 (S-Corp Election)
description: Fax line for S corporation election submissions (Form 2553). Peak use during tax season.
whatToInclude: Completed Form 2553
Signatures of all shareholders as required
Employer identification number (EIN)
Cover sheet noting tax year of election
letterTemplate:
IRS — Form 2553

Dear IRS,

Attached please find Form 2553, Election by a Small Business Corporation, for our company.

Legal entity name:
EIN:
Tax year:

Sincerely,
[Authorized signer]

name: IRS — Forms 2848 / 8821 (Power of Attorney)
description: Submit IRS Power of Attorney (Form 2848) and Tax Information Authorization (Form 8821).
whatToInclude: Signed Form 2848 or 8821 as applicable
Taxpayer name, TIN, and tax years covered
Representative CAF number if known
Clear indication of forms/years authorized

name: IRS — Missing Refund (Form 3911)
description: Fax missing or delayed federal refund inquiries (often with Form 3911).
whatToInclude: Completed Form 3911 when directed
Taxpayer name, SSN or ITIN, mailing address
Tax year and refund amount expected
Brief timeline of refund issue

name: Social Security Administration
description: Disability and benefits-related documents as directed by SSA instructions.
whatToInclude: Full legal name and Social Security number
Claim or case reference number if provided
Documents listed on your SSA notice
Cover sheet with contact phone and return fax if applicable

name: U.S. Passport Agency — Expedited
description: Expedited passport application materials when this fax is listed on official instructions.
whatToInclude: Documents specified in your passport center instructions
Proof of travel or urgency if required
Applicant full name and date of birth
Confirmation or locator number if you were given one

name: USCIS (Immigration Filings)
description: Immigration-related submissions only when USCIS instructions direct you to this fax number.
whatToInclude: Forms and supporting evidence listed in your USCIS notice
Receipt number (MSC/EAC/etc.) on every page if instructed
Cover letter summarizing contents
Do not send originals unless instructions require

name: VA — Healthcare Benefits
description: Veterans health care enrollment and benefits documentation.
whatToInclude: Veteran full name and last 4 of SSN
VA file number if known
DD-214 or service verification when requested
Forms referenced in your VA letter

name: UnitedHealthcare — Prior Authorization
description: Medical prior authorization requests — confirm plan-specific fax on your member materials.
whatToInclude: Patient name, date of birth, member ID
Ordering and servicing provider NPI
Clinical notes or guidelines attachment as required
Procedure / CPT codes requested

name: Aetna — Prior Authorization
description: Medical prior authorization — verify against your plan’s directory; numbers may vary by region.
whatToInclude: Member ID and group number
Patient demographics and diagnosis codes
Provider information and requested services
Supporting clinical documentation

name: Cigna — Medical Review
description: Medical necessity and utilization review submissions when directed by Cigna.
whatToInclude: Member ID and authorization reference
Clinical summary and treatment plan
Relevant labs or imaging summaries
Contact for follow-up questions

name: Humana — Pharmacy
description: Pharmacy prior authorization and related forms per Humana instructions.
whatToInclude: Member and prescription details
Medication name, strength, and quantity
Prescriber NPI and contact
Prior auth form completed by prescriber when required

name: 180 Medical
description: Patient referral and medical supply documentation as directed.
whatToInclude: Patient name and date of birth
Insurance and referral information
Prescription or plan of care attachments
Return contact information

name: Dun & Bradstreet — D-U-N-S
description: D-U-N-S number applications and business credit file updates.
whatToInclude: Legal business name and address
EIN or ownership documentation if requested
Contact person and phone
Reference or application ID from D&B correspondence

name: Equifax — Credit Dispute
description: Written credit report disputes and supporting documents per Equifax instructions.
whatToInclude: Full name, current address, date of birth
Report confirmation number if available
Itemized dispute with account names and numbers
Copies (not originals) of supporting proof

name: SEC — EDGAR / Filings Support
description: Securities filing-related correspondence when SEC materials reference this fax.
whatToInclude: CIK and entity name
Form type and filing date reference
Cover letter describing enclosed materials
Contact for EDGAR or filer support questions

name: Better Business Bureau (National)
description: Complaint and business correspondence when directed to BBB national fax.
whatToInclude: Your name and mailing address
Business name and location in dispute
Summary of issue and desired resolution
Prior reference or case number if assigned

name: Chase Card Services
description: Consumer credit card servicing and disputes.
whatToInclude: Full legal name as on the account
Last 4 digits of Social Security Number
Account or card number (masked if submitting online)
Brief description of your request
letterTemplate:
Chase Card Services

Re: Account inquiry / written request

Dear Sir or Madam,

Please find attached supporting documentation regarding my account.

Full name:
Last 4 SSN:
Account (last 4):

Thank you for your assistance.

Sincerely,
[Your signature]
[Printed name]
[Phone]
[Email]

name: Sample Regional Medical Group
whatToInclude: Patient full name and date of birth
Medical record or reference number
Insurance member ID (if applicable)
letterTemplate:
Sample Regional Medical Group — Records / Billing

Patient Name:
DOB:
MRN:

Please process the attached documentation.

Sincerely,
[Your name]
[Contact phone]
